title: Sort Connected Boards
excerpt: Have the ability to sort connect/mirror boards. It is difficult to sort through all the boards that are connected when it is over 10 connected boards.

posts.author: Abbie.Navickas (Abbie)
posts.cookedHtml: Have the ability to sort connect/mirror boards. It is difficult to sort through all the boards that are connected when it is over 10 connected boards.

posts.author: connor_at_rally (Connor davis)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I understand that navigating through multiple connected boards can become challenging as the number of these boards increases. Your suggestion of having a feature to sort connect/mirror boards could indeed significantly enhance the usability of monday.com.

Monday.com doesn’t offer this exact feature within its platform. However, your need for more effective navigation among your boards is clear.

We have a team specializing in creating custom integrations and enhancements for monday.com. We could potentially develop a solution to help organize and sort your connected/mirrored boards, making it easier for you to manage your workflow.

If this sounds helpful, I’d like to further discuss your needs and potential solutions.

You can reach me at connor@rallyessentials.com
